gates.name: high_value_unresolved_review_rate
gates.detail: 1/11 non-root high-value corporate vendors unresolved. Needs review: V-COMS Inc (UEI: VCOMS5L8Q2V7). SAM.gov lookup attempted 2026-05-20 — blocked by container network policy (outbound HTTP not permitted). To resolve locally: set SAM_API_KEY env var and run: python3 scripts/sam_enrichment.py --top 1; then python3 scripts/parent_collapse.py; then python3 scripts/validation_gates.py --report-only

vcoms_inc.action_required: Run sam_enrichment.py locally with SAM_API_KEY set, then re-run parent_collapse.py and validation_gates.py --report-only to populate parent_uei and drive gate to 0/11
